# daytona_docker_registry (Resource)

Manages a Daytona Docker registry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
variable "registry_password" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}

resource "daytona_docker_registry" "example" {
  name     = "example-registry"
  url      = "registry.example.com"
  username = "terraform"
  password = var.registry_password
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Registry name.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Registry password or token.
- `url` (String) Registry URL.
- `username` (String) Registry username.

### Optional

- `project` (String) Registry project or namespace.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Registry creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Daytona Docker registry ID.
- `registry_type` (String) Registry type.
- `updated_at` (String) Registry update timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import daytona_docker_registry.example "registry-id"
```
